result:
1	---
     2	name: qjudge-exam-grading-sop
     3	description: Open-ended 題目 AI 批改 SOP(YAML)。
     4	---
     5	
     6	```yaml
     7	sop:
     8	  purpose: "Open-ended AI 批改:訂 rubric + seed grade.csv → 一題一題評 → 寫回。"
     9	
    10	  artifacts:
    11	    rubric.md:
    12	      writer: artifact_write
    13	      content_type: text/markdown
    14	
    15	    grade.csv:
    16	      seeder:   artifact_csv_from_json   # Stage 2 建檔
    17	      searcher: artifact_csv_search       # Stage 3/5 狀態檢查(不帶 rows)
    18	      loader:   artifact_csv_to_json      # Stage 3/5 取批次 payload
    19	      patcher:  artifact_csv_patch        # Stage 3/5 寫回部分變動
    20	      columns: [index, exam_answer_id, username, answer_text, original_score, original_feedback, score, reason, synced]
    21	      key_column: exam_answer_id
    22	
    23	  note: >
    24	    artifact 工具的 step 參數為 optional，正常流程省略即可；
    25	    工具會自動依 filename 定位唯一 artifact。僅在同 session 出現同名檔案時才需帶 step 消歧義。
    26	
    27	  stages:
    28	    - id: 1_target
    29	      out: context [contest_id, grading_question_id]
    30	      on_missing: 逐項問 user。
    31	
    32	    - id: 2_seed
    33	      steps:
    34	        - |
    35	          # 1. 產 rubric.md
    36	          artifact_write(
    37	            filename="rubric.md",
    38	            content=<markdown 評分標準>,
    39	            content_type="text/markdown",
    40	          )
    41	        - |
    42	          # 2. 抓答案
    43	          response = qjudge_grading(
    44	            action="list_answers",
    45	            contest_id=<X>, question_id=<Y>,
    46	            projection="grading",
    47	          )
    48	          # response 形狀: {"count": N, "items": [{exam_answer_id, username, answer_text, original_score, original_feedback}, ...]}
    49	        - |
    50	          # 3. seed grade.csv（records 帶 index + 5 欄，defaults 補 score/reason/synced = 9 欄）
    51	          artifact_csv_from_json(
    52	            filename="grade.csv",
    53	            records=response["items"],
    54	            defaults={"score": "", "reason": "", "synced": ""},
    55	          )
    56	        - |
    57	          # 4. 宣告批次計畫（每 20 筆一個 todo）
    58	          write_todos(todos=[
    59	            {"content": "批改 index 1-20 依 rubric.md",  "status": "pending"},
    60	            {"content": "批改 index 21-40 依 rubric.md", "status": "pending"},
    61	            ...
    62	          ])
    63	      out: [rubric.md, grade.csv (score/reason/synced 都空), todo list]
    64	
    65	    - id: 3_grade_batch_of_20
    66	      rules:
    67	        - 一題一題依 rubric.md 決定 score 與 reason，禁止寫腳本或機械批打。
    68	        - 禁止 artifact_read + offset/limit 手動找未評列；永遠用 artifact_csv_search / artifact_csv_to_json。
    69	        - reason 政策（省 output token）：
    70	            - 預設：滿分（rubric 最高分） → reason 留空；非滿分 → 必填 reason。
    71	            - 例外：滿分但有值得給的改進建議 → 可填。
    72	            - 覆寫：若 user 在 Stage 1 明說「每題都要寫 reason / 都要評語」 → 一律填。
    73	      loop:
    74	        - |
    75	          # 1. 看還剩幾筆沒評（便宜、不拉 rows）
    76	          status = artifact_csv_search(
    77	            filename="grade.csv",
    78	            where={"score": ""},
    79	          )
    80	          # status = {"matched": M, "total_rows": N}
    81	          # matched == 0 → 進 4_writeback_confirm
    82	        - |
    83	          # 2. 取本批 20 筆 + 必要兩欄（其他欄/列不載入，省 token）
    84	          batch = artifact_csv_to_json(
    85	            filename="grade.csv",
    86	            columns=["exam_answer_id", "answer_text"],
    87	            where={"score": ""},
    88	            limit=20,
    89	          )
    90	          # batch["records"] = [{exam_answer_id, answer_text}, ...]
    91	        - |
    92	          # 3. 對每一筆獨立思考後決定 score 與 reason（依 reason 政策）
    93	        - |
    94	          # 4. 寫回本批變動
    95	          artifact_csv_patch(
    96	            filename="grade.csv",
    97	            key_column="exam_answer_id",
    98	            updates=[
    99	              {"exam_answer_id": ..., "score": "...", "reason": "..."},
   100	              ... (本批 20 筆)
   101	            ],
   102	          )
   103	        - |
   104	          # 5. 更新 todo: 本批 completed，下一批 pending → in_progress
   105	          write_todos(todos=[...])
   106	        - status.matched > 0 → 下一輪；== 0 → 進 4_writeback_confirm
   107	
   108	    - id: 4_writeback_confirm
   109	      halt: true
   110	      precondition: |
   111	        artifact_csv_search(filename="grade.csv", where={"score": ""}) 回 matched == 0
   112	        （仍有空值 → 回 3_grade_batch_of_20 補完再進這裡）
   113	      branches:
   114	        contains_writeback_keyword: goto 5_writeback
   115	        other:                      ask_again (要「寫回」)
   116	      first_entry_message: |
   117	        全部 <N> 筆已評完（右側 panel 看 grade.csv）。
   118	        - 確認寫回 → 回「確認寫回」
   119	        - 取消 → 回「取消」
   120	
   121	    - id: 5_writeback
   122	      rules:
   123	        - 禁止手動解析 CSV 或寫 Python。search 看狀態 → to_json 組 payload → batch_grade → patch 標 synced。
   124	        - 每批最多 20 筆（跟 Stage 3 批次對齊）。
   125	        - 批次計畫前/每批完成後必 write_todos（跟 Stage 3 同規則）。
   126	      loop:
   127	        - |
   128	          # 1. 看還剩幾筆沒 sync
   129	          status = artifact_csv_search(
   130	            filename="grade.csv",
   131	            where={"synced": ""},
   132	          )
   133	          # matched == 0 → 跳出 loop 進 report
   134	        - |
   135	          # 2. 取這批 MCP payload（三欄）
   136	          batch = artifact_csv_to_json(
   137	            filename="grade.csv",
   138	            columns=["exam_answer_id", "score", "reason"],
   139	            where={"synced": ""},
   140	            limit=20,
   141	          )
   142	        - |
   143	          # 3. 整批寫回
   144	          qjudge_grading(action="batch_grade", grades=batch["records"])
   145	        - |
   146	          # 4. 成功的列標 synced="yes"；失敗的留空，等下輪重試或進 report
   147	          artifact_csv_patch(
   148	            filename="grade.csv",
   149	            key_column="exam_answer_id",
   150	            updates=[{"exam_answer_id": ..., "synced": "yes"}, ...],  # 只放成功的
   151	          )
   152	        - |
   153	          # 5. 更新 todo
   154	          write_todos(todos=[...])
   155	      report: 寫回 X 筆成功、Y 筆失敗（失敗列 exam_answer_id + 錯誤）。
   156	      idempotency: 同一 exam_answer_id 重複視為 no-op；synced=="yes" 的 row 下輪會自動被 where filter 跳過。
   157	
   158	  stage_resolution:
   159	    primary: artifact_list + artifact_csv_search
   160	    secondary: last_assistant_message
   161	    fallback: ask_user
   162	    map:
   163	      - {artifacts: [],                                    candidates: [1_target, 2_seed]}
   164	      - {artifacts: [rubric.md, grade.csv], score_empty>0: stage: 3_grade_batch_of_20}
   165	      - {artifacts: [rubric.md, grade.csv], score_empty=0: candidates: [4_writeback_confirm, 5_writeback]}
   166	
   167	  hard_rules:
   168	    - MCP 解析 / CSV 組裝必須在同一 turn 內自己做，禁 delegate task/subagent。
   169	    - 評分時一題一題思考並填 score，禁止寫腳本或機械批打。
   170	    - 任何批次操作「前」都要 write_todos 宣告批次計畫；「每批完成後」立刻 write_todos 把該批標 completed；todo 未更新 = 不可進下一批。
   171	    - 禁止用 artifact_read + offset/limit 找未評/未 sync 列；永遠用 artifact_csv_search（狀態）或 artifact_csv_to_json（取 rows）。
   172	    - 寫回前 user 訊息必須含「寫回」兩字。
   173	```

input_data.content:
# 評分準則

- 題目：What is “local replacement” and “global replacement”?
- 滿分：2 分

## 給分標準

- 2 分：
  - 正確說明 local replacement：程序只能從「自己被分配到的 frames」中選擇要置換的 frame。
  - 正確說明 global replacement：程序可以從「所有 memory frames」中選擇要置換的 frame。
- 1 分：
  - 只正確說明其中一個，或兩者都有提到但其中一個定義不完整／略有瑕疵。
- 0 分：
  - 兩者都未正確說明，或內容明顯混淆 local 與 global replacement。

## 批改重點

- local replacement 的核心是「限制在自己的 allocated frames」。
- global replacement 的核心是「可在整體記憶體 frames 中挑選」。
- 允許同義轉述，但意思必須明確。

Global replacement could swap with any pages in the memory."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4722", "answer_text": "local:replaced by frame that only in same set of the process;global:can be replaced by all memory frame."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4723", "answer_text": "local: process在自己分到的memory中挑選要替換的page。global: process 在所有memory space中挑選要替換的page"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3910", "answer_text": "local replacement是指在page replacement中，process只會swap out自己的page；而global replacement會swap out其他process的page"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5067", "answer_text": "local replacement means a process can only replace a frame allocated to it. global replacement means a process could replace a frame allocated to other processes."}, {"exam_answer_id": "5792", "answer_text": "當指派給 process 的頁框被寫滿，需要尋找 victim page 來替換時；local: 只能替換分配給此 process 的頁框；global: 可以替換其他 process 的頁框。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4438", "answer_text": "Local: process 要做 page replacement 時，只能在自己的 memory frames 去選擇要替換的分頁；而 global replacement 則可以在所有的 memory frames 去選擇所要替換掉的分頁。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4015", "answer_text": "local replacement是process只能用他allocate的frame 做replacement，global replacement是可以用全部的frame做replacement"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5633", "answer_text": "local replacement let the process which are going to replace a page can only choose its own set of page. And global replacement means that when a process can replace any page."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2527", "answer_text": "local means process choose a replacement from its own allocated memory, but the global means it may also choose from shared part"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4815", "answer_text": "local replacement : the process can only select the frame from its own allocated set when replacement is needed. global replacement : the process can select frame from all the memory frames when replacement is needed."}, {"exam_answer_id": "5493", "answer_text": "Local replacement is that process choose a frame from its own allocated memory to replace. Global replacement is that the process choose the replacement frame from all memory"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4651", "answer_text": "Local replacement - on page fault, a process can evict only the frame that belongs to the process. Global replacement - on a page fault, a process can evict a frame that belong to other processes. Global replacement is more efficient, because process that need more memory can take memory from processes that don't use a lot of memory."}, {"exam_answer_id": "5025", "answer_text": "Local: process can only do \"swap\" in its own; Global: process can do \"swap\" in others"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4729", "answer_text": "local replacement can only swap process's own memory page, but global can swap any page"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2627", "answer_text": "When a process needs a new page to be loaded, local replacement is using one of his allocated frames to do so, while global replacement is using frames outside of its allocated ones"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4356", "answer_text": "local replacement : when a process replace its own frames. Global replacement : when a process replace its frames by external frames that it does not owned."}, {"exam_answer_id": "5287", "answer_text": "{\n  \"text\": \"\"\n}"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4287", "answer_text": "local replacement 只和同個process的換pages，global replacement可以所有人換"}]}

"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4601", "answer_text": "local replacement only replace in the same page, but global replacement can replace whole memory"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3773", "answer_text": "local replacement:發生page fault時，只能使用自身process的frame進行替換,global replacement:發生page fault時，可以使用其他process的frame替換"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3783", "answer_text": "Local replacement: A process can only replace frames that are allocated to it. Global replacement: The available frames in the memory can all have a chance to be replaced."}, {"exam_answer_id": "6472", "answer_text": "local replacement means choose the victom page to swap out from the page of its own process, global replacement means choose the victom page from all pages in virtual memory"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4580", "answer_text": "local replacement: process only can get the frame in its region. Global replacement: it can take all possible frame, that is, it is possible to take the frame which is assigned to other process."}, {"exam_answer_id": "5951", "answer_text": "local replacement 表示一個 process 要進行 paging 時，只能拿自己的其他 pages 更換；global replacement 則可以拿其他 process 的 pages 做更換。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3941", "answer_text": "Local指的是指能用分被給這個process的frame，global則是沒有限制。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4178", "answer_text": "local:程式只可從自身被分配的frame中選擇替換；global:可從所有分發的frame中選擇"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5021", "answer_text": "local replacement:執行中的process發生page fault 且 memory空間不夠要做page replacement時，只能從process自己被分配到的frames中挑選victim frames去做交換。global replacement:能從系統的physical memory裡面挑選victim frames做交換，所以可能挑到其他process的frames。"}]}

{"count": 20, "total_matched": 82, "records": [{"exam_answer_id": "4125", "answer_text": "local replacement就是只在一定範圍內取代。global replacement沒有限制取代的範圍。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3969", "answer_text": "Local repalcement: a process can only select the replacement frame from its own set of allocated frames. Global replacement: a process may select the replacement frame from the set of all memory frames."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2413", "answer_text": "local replacement only replace in its own set, global can replace any of all."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2376", "answer_text": "local replacement: it only can replace from its own allocation memory. global replacement: it can replace from global ."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2151", "answer_text": "local:replace own frame，global:replace all frame"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3904", "answer_text": "local replacement的replacement page只能選用自己被分配到的pages; global replacement則可以使用all memory pages"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3950", "answer_text": "local replacement can only replaced its allocated page frames, while global replacement can replaced all the memory frames."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4398", "answer_text": "local只能從這個process 對應的frame去換，但global可以從所有執行中process的frame去換"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4105", "answer_text": "local顧名思義就是想要踢走memory裡的frames替換成自己需要的frames時，只能夠從自己被分配到的memory空間裡去選擇。   global則是能夠從整個memory空間裡去選擇要踢掉哪些frames，想踢別人家的也可以"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5337", "answer_text": "local replacement is replacing a page within the attributed space, whereas global replaces the page anywhere in the memory."}, {"exam_answer_id": "2983", "answer_text": "local是指replacement frame只能從allocated的frame選，Global則是可以從所有的frame中選"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4348", "answer_text": "local replacement can only happen in one page table, global replacement can happen in multiple page table"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2864", "answer_text": "local replacement：只能跟自己的frame交換 ，global replacement：可以跟整個系統所有的frame交換"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6727", "answer_text": "local replacement在需要替換頁面時，只能從分配給自己的空間下手。而global replacement則可對整個System的頁面進行替換。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2780", "answer_text": "local: 只能從程序被分配到的frame找victim page。global: 能從系統所有frame找victim page"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5105", "answer_text": "local replace:行程只能請求在同一個配置下的frame 。global replacement :行程可以請求所有memory下的frame"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3637", "answer_text": "當一個process要replace frame的時候只能從他的allocated的memory去換，而Global replacdment則是指要replace frame的時候可以從整個全域的記憶體去做替換。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4837", "answer_text": "local replacement: process只能從自己process裡面的frames當中選擇要交換的page.但global replacement是可以在不同的process中的frames當中找到要交換的pages"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2766", "answer_text": "local replacement是占用同一個process內的memory；global replacement則是可以占用其他process的memory"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4248", "answer_text": "local replacement: 替換位址時，只從自己被分配到的區塊作替換。global replacement: 可以在整個global的區域作變動。"}]}

{"count": 20, "total_matched": 22, "records": [{"exam_answer_id": "6381", "answer_text": "Local replacement:只能在被分配的記憶體frame的找尋replacement。而Global replacement則能在所有的記憶體中找尋replacement。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6345", "answer_text": "所謂local replacement是指頁框內的分頁替換，為程序本身分配到的記憶體內選擇分頁替換，不會影響其他頁框。所謂global replacement是指任意程式由系統整體選擇替換分頁。"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4392", "answer_text": "local replacemant: process只能從被分配到的momory選擇replacement page。 global replacement: process可以從all memory選擇replacement page"}, {"exam_answer_id": "5561", "answer_text": "local replacement frame: a process can choose a replacement frame just in it own set. global: it can choose from all memory space."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4953", "answer_text": "local replacement:只能在自身擁有的之間做replacement;global replacement可以在所有記憶體空間中做replacement"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4247", "answer_text": "local只能從它的allocated中去replace frame，blobal可以從all memory frame中"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3857", "answer_text": "local replacement: the process can only choose the memory frame of its own set to replace   globalreplacement: the process can choose the memory frame from whole memory to replace"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6392", "answer_text": "local replacement can select a replacement frame from the allocated frame. global replacement cna select a replacement frame from memory frame."}, {"exam_answer_id": "3808", "answer_text": "local replacement choose the victim from the process its allocated frame, global replacement choose the victim from all process' allocated frame.."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4018", "answer_text": "While the frame is full now, we need to take some of them out and replace is with a more essential one. 'Local Replacement' is a policy that you can only replace the frame which is used for the same process while the 'global replacement' permit to replace the frames from other processes."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4283", "answer_text": "local replacement是指一個process只能在被分配到的記憶體frame中選一個替換。而global replacement是指一個process可以在所有記憶體frame中選一個替換"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3899", "answer_text": "local replacement 是只能替換掉自己resident set 裡面allocate的frame,global replacement是可以換掉不是自己allocate的memory 整個中的都能替換"}, {"exam_answer_id": "2590", "answer_text": "Local replacement : Process can use replacement  just its own set of frame.  Global replacement: Process can use replacement from set of all memory frames."}, {"exam_answer_id": "3537", "answer_text": "local replacement: process can only select from its own set of memory frames. global replacement: process can select from all set of memory frames."}, {"exam_answer_id": "4016", "answer_text": "local replacement是指當發生page fault時，process只能從resident set來決定要替換掉的page；global replacement是指page fault時，process可以從整個memory中決定要替換的page"}, {"exam_answer_id": "6099", "answer_text": "local replacement是指只能從its own frames得到replacement frames，而global replacement可以從all memory frames得到"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4870", "answer_text": "local replacement就是只能用自己的frame ，global replacement就是整個memory的frame都能使用"}, {"exam_answer_id": "3713", "answer_text": "Local replacement is a thread that can only use its fragmentation from it own replacement set of allocated memory. Global replacement is a thread used other fragmentation from all replacement set of memory."}, {"exam_answer_id": "5464", "answer_text": "local:  在給定的page frame中，當新進程進來時，踢除page frame中執行最久的進程並使用。global: 當系統的總記憶體中有執行較久的，可以將其剔除並使用"}, {"exam_answer_id": "4473", "answer_text": "local replacement只能選擇自己的page做page swap。global replacement可以選擇任意page做page swap。"}]}
